parityMeta.describes: AN-8 sort-stability load-bearing fixture for buildAdherenceReport's skippedExercises count-desc sort. The single case has six exercises in ONE session, each with a single incomplete set (planned 1 > actual 0) so each is skipped EXACTLY once — a PURE count tie (every count == 1). JS Array.prototype.sort is STABLE, so the count-desc sort keeps the Map first-seen (insertion) order; the slice(0,5) cut then drops the last-inserted tie member. The exercise ids are in reverse-alphabetical INSERTION order so the pinned skippedExercises order [skip-zulu, skip-yankee, skip-xray, skip-whiskey, skip-victor] is visibly insertion-ordered, NOT id-sorted. This is load-bearing for the Swift AnalyticsDashboardEngine.stableSorted port: Swift's sort(by:) is not contractually stable, so the port breaks ties on the original index to GUARANTEE this JS order. Generated from src/engines/analytics.ts:406 via scripts/generate-parity-goldens.mjs; the Swift compute-asserts the full AdherenceReport == golden. Generated, never hand-edited (master-architecture §22).
